enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Senjitaley'?

The song 'Senjitaley' celebrates the playful and joyful aspects of love, highlighting the excitement of romantic encounters.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Remo'?

The movie 'Remo' revolves around a young man who disguises himself as a woman to win the heart of his love interest, leading to humorous and romantic situations.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Senjitaley'?

The song is sung by Anirudh and composed by Anirudh himself, showcasing his versatility as an artist.

When was 'Senjitaley' released?

'Senjitaley' was released on July 1, 2016, as part of the movie Remo.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Remo, the song Senjitaley serves as a lively expression of love and attraction, perfectly encapsulating the playful spirit of romance. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a favorite among fans. The song's vibrant energy reflects the protagonist's whimsical journey in pursuit of love. Overall, it conveys a sense of youthful exuberance and the thrill of new relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Senjitaley from Remo is a vibrant celebration of love, showcasing Anirudh's infectious energy and catchy beats. This song perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance with its playful lyrics and upbeat rhythm. Dive into the world of love and fun with this delightful track that will surely get you dancing!
stanzaMeanings: I lost a look in the crowd, what have I done? What have I done?
Without looking at the surroundings, I did something.
First, I gave a look and then I did something, I did something.
Love is like a book, I opened it in my heart.
With just one glance, what have I done? What have I done? What have I done?
I released the arrow of love, what have I done? What have I done? I did something.
I don't want you to be easy, I will correct everything by talking!!
Don't mess around, don't be careless, I don't want this love, no, no.
I don't want your horoscope, I don't want your parents' approval.
I don't want anything that comes with you, no, no, no.
My heart is restless, it wants to hold you, it can't stop looking at you.
My heart is restless, what should I do? It keeps searching for you, it's not poison.
Yes!! In a dark room, I put an LED light, and it shines, it shines, I brought petrol with me.
Looking at girls, I feel like a snake, what is this?
Pa pa pa pa, I am showing off, will you look at me?
For me, you are a god, and for you, I am the one who was born.
This has been happening for twenty years, only the one who knows everything is the one who understands.
But even if it happens...
I don't want you to be easy, I will correct everything by talking!!
Don't mess around, don't be careless, I don't want this love, no, no.
I don't want your horoscope, I don't want your parents' approval.
I don't want anything that comes with you, no, no, no.
I lost a look in the crowd, what have I done? What have I done?
Without looking at the surroundings, I did something.
First, I gave a look and then I did something, I did something.
Love is like a book, I opened it in my heart.
With just one glance, what have I done? What have I done? What have I done?
I released the arrow of love, what have I done? What have I done? I did something.
My heart is restless, it wants to hold you, it can't stop looking at you.
My heart is restless, what should I do? It keeps searching for you, it's not poison.
What have I done? What have I done? What have I done? What have I done?
